metadata.title: Xavier Adda - Fullstack Developer PHP & Next.js
metadata.description: Fullstack web developer with 7+ years of experience. Specialized in PHP (Symfony, Laravel) and Next.js/React. Freelance available.

about.title: About
about.description: Fullstack developer with over 7 years of experience, I build robust and scalable web applications. My approach: understand your business needs to deliver solutions that work today and adapt tomorrow.
about.value1Desc: Clean architecture, documented code and best practices to facilitate the evolution of your project
about.value2Desc: Optimized load times, efficient queries and smooth user experience
about.value3Desc: Regular updates, transparency on progress and responsiveness for a smooth project

Modern UI/UX integration from Figma mockups
Ongoing maintenance of an e-learning platform

Complete security: CSRF, XSS, security audit

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: My personal achievements and client missions

featured.title: FlowSolo
featured.longDescription: FlowSolo is a comprehensive productivity application designed specifically for solopreneurs and independent entrepreneurs. Based on Tiago Forte's PARA methodology (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives) and the Second Brain concept, it centralizes all your professional organization in a single workspace. The application integrates advanced task management with customizable Kanban boards, a goal tracking system with progress visualization, a built-in Pomodoro timer to optimize your work sessions, and detailed productivity analytics to identify your patterns and improve your efficiency. The modern and intuitive interface, developed with Next.js 15 and TypeScript, offers a smooth and performant user experience, while the robust backend architecture with PostgreSQL and Prisma ensures the reliability and scalability of your data.

items.title: SteamHunter
items.description: Mobile app for tracking Steam achievements, stats and competing with friends.
items.longDescription: SteamHunter is a comprehensive mobile companion app for Steam gamers. Built with React Native and Expo, it lets users track their achievement progress with rarity classifications, compare stats with friends, monitor a rival player, and climb leaderboards. The app features 6 custom themes, offline support via MMKV cache, real-time updates with Supabase, and a marketing landing page built with Next.js. Available on Google Play.
highlights: Landing page with Next.js and i18n

items.title: CitrusForge
items.description: AI content generation SaaS platform with the best models on the market.
items.longDescription: Complete AI content generation platform integrating Sora, Veo 3, Pika and Runway. Subscription system with Stripe, credits management and intuitive user interface.
highlights: Multi-model AI integration (Sora, Veo 3, Pika, Runway)

items.title: I Learn Romanian
items.description: Visual redesign and SEO optimization of an online Romanian learning platform (240+ students, 42 countries).
items.longDescription: Complete redesign of a WordPress site for a certified Romanian tutor. New Romanian flag-inspired branding, SEO optimization, hosting migration to Hostinger and online course booking system setup.
highlights: Visual redesign with Romanian flag-inspired branding
SEO optimization: Schema.org, Open Graph, metadata
Hosting migration from DreamHost to Hostinger

items.title: Portfolio

items.longDescription: Portfolio website built with the latest technologies. Modern design, scroll animations, light/dark theme system and French/English multilingual support.

items.title: The Red Master
items.description: Portfolio for a designer specialized in illustration and motion design.
items.longDescription: Professional showcase website design and development for a freelance designer specializing in illustration and motion design. Optimized responsive interface featuring an interactive hero slider, project gallery with dynamic filtering system and customized contact form.
highlights: Interactive hero slider with smooth transitions

items.title: CroqueRecettes
items.description: Recipe management application with authentication and favorites.
items.longDescription: Web application for creating, organizing and sharing recipes. Complete authentication system, favorites management and advanced search. Redesign planned with Next.js.
